name: icons
description: Lucide icon body map for Lit islands: `iconBody(name)` returns the inner SVG markup for a vendored Lucide icon, inlined into the component's own <svg> wrapper and tinted via --lv-* tokens + currentColor. A registry dependency, not a standalone component.
docs: Internal helper; pulled in automatically as a dependency of any lievit-ui component that renders an inline Lucide icon (e.g. calendar, carousel). Import { iconBody } and inline unsafeSVG(iconBody(name)) inside an <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"> wrapper.
